description:
A new client application for QNAP surveillance system, supporting QVR Pro, QVR Elite and QVP series surveillance appliances.

QVR Pro Client is a new client application for QNAP surveillance system, supporting QVR Pro, QVR Elite and QVP series surveillance appliances. You can browse multiple channels at once, enjoying efficient and easy management of surveillance recordings.
[Important Notes]
- QVR Pro Client installation package is not included in QVR Pro. To install QVR Pro Client, download the latest installation package from the QNAP website: https://www.qnap.com/go/utilities/surveillance
- QVR Smart Client now does not require QVR AI Pack license and needs for CAYIN Media Viewer or CAYIN MediaSign Player installation.
[New Features]
Event Notifications (Main Screen)
- Added a feature to merge consecutive duplicate events to keep the notification list concise.
- Added "Quick Filter" to the filtering options to improve search efficiency.
Face Live View (Main Screen)
- Added a feature to merge consecutive duplicate faces for an optimized view.
- Added a feature to filter detection records.
- Added support for selecting and monitoring multiple face detection tasks simultaneously, based on specific views and cameras.
Camera Management (Main Screen)
- Added the [Event Settings] option in the camera menu to quickly enable various camera event detection features.
- Added comprehensive management actions for QVR Face and QVR Human AI tasks in the camera list, including "Enable/Disable", "Edit", "Delete", and "Event".
[Fixed Issues]
- Fixed known security vulnerabilities to enhance overall system security.
- Fixed an issue where connecting to the surveillance server via myQNAPcloud Link might fail.
- Fixed an issue with abnormal PTZ joystick control behavior.
- Fixed an issue in multi-monitor environments where continuously dragging a window could cause it to display in an abnormal size.
